assertions.reason: Sources tab rendered tree entries matching GET /api/sources output (articles/, books/, articles/ai-safety.md, books/sample-book.md, rust-intro.md).

evidence.observation: Sources tab active with full tree visible.
Contains fetch requests to /api/sources.
GET /api/sources returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK.

assertions.reason: books/sample-book.md is shown as pending in the Sources tree, but wiki/entities/typescript.md frontmatter lists sources: [books/sample-book.md], so it should be ingested.

evidence.observation: UI label shows "sample-book.md pending".
GET /api/dashboard returned HTTP 200 for pending list source.
evidence.note: API content observed during run included sample-book.md in pending.

evidence.observation: Recorded mismatch between UI pending indicator and wiki frontmatter source reference.

assertions.reason: Clicking pending source pre-filled chat input with ingest command and did not auto-send.

evidence.observation: After clicking ai-safety.md, input value was ingest articles/ai-safety.md.
No console errors captured.
No new chat message appeared after pre-fill action.

assertions.reason: Clicking pending source showed markdown content preview while preserving ingest pre-fill behavior.

evidence.observation: Content preview displayed AI Safety markdown text.
Includes /api/sources?path=articles%2Fai-safety.md fetch request.
Preview and chat prefill observed simultaneously for pending file.

assertions.reason: With raw/ temporarily emptied, Sources view displayed a clear empty-state message and remained usable.

evidence.observation: Displayed "No files in raw/ yet" empty state.
No console errors captured during empty-state validation.
Fixture was restored after test.

assertions.reason: Directory nodes expanded/collapsed correctly and child visibility changed as expected.

evidence.observation: After collapsing articles, ai-safety.md was hidden.
After expanding, nested file entries reappeared under directories.

assertions.reason: Uploading a file through the Source Manager upload control triggered POST /api/sources/upload, rendered the file as pending, and created the file on disk; fixture was restored after validation.

evidence.observation: upload-src007.md appeared in tree with pending indicator.
Includes fetch requests to /api/sources/upload followed by /api/sources refresh.
Confirmed file existed on disk during validation at /tmp/apara-utv-source-manager-XZO4mB/raw/upload-src007.md.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests command returned "No requests captured" during this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured API request evidence via performance.getEntriesByType('resource') and stored in network-performance-entries.json.

frictions.description: Direct OS-level drag gesture is not exposed in this headless CLI workflow.
frictions.resolution: Validated upload path via Source Manager file input control, confirming POST /api/sources/upload + pending tree render + on-disk file creation.

summary: Tested 7 source-manager assertions: 6 passed, 1 failed (VAL-SRC-002 ingestion status mismatch for books/sample-book.md).
